title: David Silver (computer scientist)
excerpts: **David Silver** (born 1976) is a principal research scientist at Google DeepMind and a professor at University College London . He has led research on reinforcement learning with AlphaGo , AlphaZero and co-lead on AlphaStar") . <sup>[[ 1 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 2 ]]()</sup>

Funders had no role in study design, data collection and analysis, decision to publish, or preparation of the manuscript. The Graphical Abstract was created using BioRender.
Address correspondence to: David L. Silver, Duke-NUS Medical School, 8 College Road, Singapore 169857. Email: david.silver@duke-nus.edu.sg .

title: Exclusive: Google DeepMind researcher David Silver ...
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > A key figure behind many of DeepMind’s breakthroughs
Content:
Silver was one of DeepMind’s first employees when the company was established in 2010. He knew DeepMind cofounder Demis Hassabis from university. Silver played an instrumental role in many of the company’s early breakthroughs, including its landmark 2016 achievement with [AlphaGo](https://fortune.com/2016/01/27/google-deepmind-chinese-go/) , demonstrating that an AI program could beat the world’s best human players at the ancient strategy game Go.

title: David C. Silver | Founding Partner of Silver Miller
excerpts:
Section Title: David C. Silver > David C. Silver
Content:
David is also quickly becoming recognized as one of the leading lawyers in America representing victims of crooked and abusive cryptocurrency exchanges, helping investors who have been exploited after investing in digital assets such as Bitcoin, Ether, and Litecoin. **In 2015, David was named lead Class Counsel** in the litigation against now-defunct cryptocurrency exchange **Cryptsy** , where he led the effort in recovering for the Court-certified class of Cryptsy customers settlements and judgments valued in excess of $40 million. With additional class action lawsuits pending against **Kraken** , and other cryptocurrency exchanges , David is continuing his fight for individuals aggrieved by exploited members of the cryptocurrency community.

title: Bear Creek Fund Advisors | Real Asset and Credit Investing | Denver | New York City
excerpts:
Section Title: A patient, disciplined, and nimble approach to niche market investing. > ... > Partner > CFO and CCO
Content:
David Silver leads Bear Creek's accounting, organizational, and compliance activities across all segments of the firm. Mr. Silver joined Bear Creek in 2012 and has been instrumental in driving financial strategy and maintaining robust policies and procedures in an ever-evolving regulatory landscape. Mr. Silver also collaborates with the broader team on tax-efficient structuring, documentation, accounting, valuation, reporting, and investor relations. Prior to joining Bear Creek David was a senior auditor with Deloitte. David graduated from the University of Colorado with a B.S. and M.S. in Accounting and he is a Certified Public Accountant (CPA).
